skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

Covers workspace auditing, token budget analysis, new agent workspace setup from scratch, memory distillation, and cross-file consistency reviews.

resolvedSkills.name: shadowrocket-node-sync
resolvedSkills.description: Monitor the GitHub repo seablue1985/v2ray-SSR-Clash-Verge-Shadowrocke, extract free proxy node URIs, generate local Shadowrocket-friendly subscription files, and optionally send Feishu notifications when the node inventory changes. Use when the user asks to watch free nodes, refresh GitHub proxy nodes, sync/update Shadowrocket free nodes, build a local subscription source, get alerted on node changes, or automate periodic node checks.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-evolver
resolvedSkills.description: Skill 自进化引擎。判断流程是否值得沉淀、创建/更新 Skill、去重审计、每日定时回顾。触发场景：复杂任务（≥5步工具调用）完成后自觉判断沉淀时机，以及每日 cron 回顾。

resolvedSkills.name: stock-market-pro
resolvedSkills.description: Yahoo Finance (yfinance) powered stock analysis skill: quotes, fundamentals, ASCII trends, high-resolution charts (RSI/MACD/BB/VWAP/ATR), plus optional web add-ons (news + browser-first options/flow).

resolvedSkills.name: stock-watcher
resolvedSkills.description: Manage and monitor a personal stock watchlist with support for adding, removing, listing stocks, and summarizing their recent performance using data from 10jqka.com.cn. Use when the user wants to track specific stocks, get performance summaries, or manage their watchlist.

resolvedSkills.name: ths-local-holdings
resolvedSkills.description: Inspect Tonghuashun/同花顺真实持仓 from two sources: (1) the 10jqka 投资账本 web app (`tzzb.10jqka.com.cn`) when a reusable browser session or exported request is available, and (2) local macOS Tonghuashun app ledger files as a fail-closed fallback. Use when the user mentions 同花顺持仓、投资账本网页、10jqka tzzb 链接、同花顺 App、本地账本、多账户混仓、账本识别、真实持仓校准, or when reports/alerts are using the wrong holdings scope and you need a verified source instead of guessing.

resolvedSkills.name: web-pilot
resolvedSkills.description: Search the web and read page contents without API keys. Use when you need to search via DuckDuckGo/Brave/Google (multi-page), extract readable text from URLs, browse interactively with a persistent visible browser (with tabs, click, screenshot, text search), download files/PDFs, or dismiss cookie banners. Supports JSON/markdown/text output. Powered by Playwright + Chromium.

resolvedSkills.name: xiaohongshu
resolvedSkills.description:
小红书（RedNote）内容工具。使用场景：
- 搜索小红书笔记并获取详情
- 获取首页推荐列表
- 获取帖子详情（正文、图片、互动数据、评论）
- 发表评论 / 回复评论
- 获取用户主页和笔记列表
- 点赞、收藏帖子
- 发布图文或视频笔记
- 热点话题跟踪与分析报告
- 帖子导出为长图
触发词示例：
- "搜一下小红书上的XX"
- "跟踪一下小红书上的XX热点"
- "分析小红书上关于XX的讨论"
- "小红书XX话题报告"
- "生成XX的小红书舆情报告"

resolvedSkills.name: firecrawl
resolvedSkills.description:
Official Firecrawl CLI skill for web scraping, search, crawling, and browser automation. Returns clean LLM-optimized markdown.

USE FOR:
- Web search and research
- Scraping pages, docs, and articles
- Site mapping and bulk content extraction
- Browser automation for interactive pages

Must be pre-installed and authenticated. See rules/install.md for setup, rules/security.md for output handling.

resolvedSkills.name: auto-updater
resolvedSkills.description: Automatically update Clawdbot and all installed skills once daily. Runs via cron, checks for updates, applies them, and messages the user with a summary of what changed.

resolvedSkills.name: camoufox-cli
resolvedSkills.description: Anti-detect browser automation CLI for AI agents. Use when the user needs to interact with websites with bot detection, CAPTCHAs, or anti-bot blocks, including navigating pages, filling forms, clicking buttons, taking screenshots, extracting data, testing web apps, or automating any browser task that requires bypassing fingerprint checks.

resolvedSkills.name: claude-websearch
resolvedSkills.description: Free web search using Claude Code CLI or Codex CLI's built-in WebSearch tool — no Tavily, Brave, or Exa API key required. Activate when the user says "websearch", "搜一下", "search the web", or when Tavily/Brave quota is exhausted and you need to search the web.

resolvedSkills.name: ddg-search
resolvedSkills.description: Web search without an API key using DuckDuckGo Lite via web_fetch. Use as a fallback when web_search fails with missing_brave_api_key error, or whenever you need to search the web and no search API is configured. Provides titles, URLs, and snippets for research queries. Zero dependencies — works with just the built-in web_fetch tool.

resolvedSkills.name: markdown-mirror-search
resolvedSkills.description: Use when the user asks to search the web, read webpages, convert a URL into readable markdown/text, scrape article content, or gather information from websites without relying on raw page HTML. For search requests, use web search first to find candidate URLs, then extract readable content with this skill. Prefer mirror services in this order: (1) markdown.new for the original URL, especially when Cloudflare-backed pages work there, (2) defuddle.md for a second markdown extraction pass, (3) r.jina.ai for plain-text or markdown-style extraction. If all mirror services fail or the page requires heavier scraping, fall back to the bundled script and Scrapling.

resolvedSkills.name: openclaw-backup
resolvedSkills.description: Backup and restore OpenClaw data. Use when user asks to create backups, set up automatic backup schedules, restore from backup, or manage backup rotation. Handles ~/.openclaw directory archiving with proper exclusions.

resolvedSkills.name: openclaw-spirits
resolvedSkills.description: Companion spirit system for OpenClaw agents. Deterministically generates a unique spirit (24 species, 5 rarities) based on user identity. Use when user says spirit, 灵兽, summon, my companion, my pet, or when the skill is first installed.

resolvedSkills.name: pua
resolvedSkills.description: Forces high-agency exhaustive problem-solving with corporate PUA pressure. Triggers on user frustration, repeated failures, passive behavior, or quality complaints. Common triggers: try harder, figure it out, stop giving up, you keep failing, stop spinning, you broke it, 加油, 别偷懒, 你再试试, 又错了, 降智了, 你又在原地打转, 你把之前的改坏了, /pua. All task types.

resolvedSkills.name: self-improvement
resolvedSkills.description: Captures learnings, errors, and corrections to enable continuous improvement. Use when: (1) A command or operation fails unexpectedly, (2) User corrects Claude ('No, that's wrong...', 'Actually...'), (3) User requests a capability that doesn't exist, (4) An external API or tool fails, (5) Claude realizes its knowledge is outdated or incorrect, (6) A better approach is discovered for a recurring task. Also review learnings before major tasks.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-vetter
resolvedSkills.description: Security-first skill vetting for AI agents. Use before installing any skill from ClawdHub, GitHub, or other sources. Checks for red flags, permission scope, and suspicious patterns.

resolvedSkills.name: stock-daily-report
resolvedSkills.description: A 股每日报告生成器 - 含 K 线图、技术指标、市场分析（仅供学习参考）

resolvedSkills.name: union-search-skill
resolvedSkills.description: 当用户需要跨多个平台搜索内容时使用此技能，包括 GitHub（仓库、代码、问题）、Reddit（帖子、子版块、用户）、小红书、抖音、Bilibili、YouTube、Twitter、Google、Tavily、秘塔搜索、火山引擎，以及通用搜索引擎（DuckDuckGo、Brave、Yahoo、Bing、Wikipedia、Anna's Archive），或从 18 个图片平台（百度、Bing、Google、Pixabay、Unsplash、火山引擎等）下载图片。提供统一的搜索接口，支持结构化输出格式、结果过滤、排序、自动响应归档和批量图片下载（保留元数据）。

resolvedSkills.name: xiaohongshu-search-summarizer
resolvedSkills.description: Searches Xiaohongshu(小红书) for a given keyword, extracts the top N posts (including texts, images, and user comments), and then synthesizes a comprehensive final analytical report. Use this skill whenever the user wants to search Xiaohongshu for a specific topic, compile research seamlessly combining text and images, or needs an aggregated thematic summary of social media posts, comments, and visual data on a given subject.

resolvedSkills.name: xiaohongshu-skills
resolvedSkills.description:
小红书自动化技能集合。支持认证登录、内容发布、搜索发现、社交互动、复合运营。
当用户要求操作小红书（发布、搜索、评论、登录、分析、点赞、收藏）时触发。

**Turn Context (split turn):**

## 目标
修复"周到"（xiaoguanjia）和"coding agent"与 OpenClaw 的飞书连接问题——目前只有"来福来财"（main agent）发的消息能收到。

## 约束与偏好
- 仅能通过飞书频道接收消息（飞书是唯一的外部消息通道）
- 不清楚"周到"和"coding agent"具体使用哪个飞书账号

## 进展
### 已完成
- [x] 通过 `openclaw status` 确认飞书频道状态为 **OFF / disabled**
- [x] 通过 `gateway config.get` 确认 `channels.feishu.enabled: false` 是根本原因
- [x] 通过源码分析确认 `openclaw-lark` 插件从 `channels.feishu` 读取配置，使用 `appId`/`appSecret`/`enabled` 等字段
- [x] 确认 `~/.openclaw/secrets/feishu_app_secret` 文件存在（内容为 `8DdEUA04tEjcp0CX7Z4L0gaxRbtutjon`）
- [x] 确认 `openclaw-lark` 插件已加载（`@larksuite/openclaw-lark`）

### 进行中
- [ ] 尝试通过 `gateway config.patch` 修改 `channels.feishu.enabled: true`，但 schema 验证失败

### 阻塞
- `channels.feishu` 的 JSON Schema 有 `additionalProperties: false`，且要求字段：`domain`、`connectionMode`、`webhookPath`、`dmPolicy`、`groupPolicy`、`reactionNotifications`、`typingIndicator`、`resolveSenderNames`
- 当前 `openclaw.json` 中 `channels.feishu` 只有 `{ "enabled": false }`，缺少所有必填字段
- `config.patch` 报错：`Unrecognized key: "feishu"` — 路径层级不对

## 关键决策
- **直接写入 `openclaw.json`**：`gateway config.patch` 无法工作，需要直接修改 `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json` 中的 `channels.feishu` 配置

## 下一步
1. 读取完整 `openclaw.json`，查看其中 `channels.feishu` 的完整结构（当前被截断）
2. 从 `openclaw-lark` 源码中找到各字段的默认值，构建合法的 `channels.feishu` 配置（至少需要 `domain`、`connectionMode`、`webhookPath`）
3. 直接修改 `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`，将 `channels.feishu.enabled` 改为 `true`，并补充 schema 要求的必填字段
4. 验证飞书频道变为 **ON**

## 关键上下文
- **配置文件**：`~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`
- **插件目录**：`~/.openclaw/extensions/openclaw-lark/`
- **Secret 文件**：`~/.openclaw/secrets/feishu_app_secret`（值：`8DdEUA04tEjcp0CX7Z4L0gaxRbtutjon`）、`~/.openclaw/secrets/bitsoul.env`（`BITSOUL_TOKEN=Ljvv6sWtrMRYNeIzsF8bjtMmaHypypHLkaoGiNNosaE`）
- **当前飞书会话**：`agent:main:feishu:group:oc_8a819be3a90d35b8d0a2d5c1f4642b22`（状态 running，1分钟前）
- **Schema 路径**：`channels.feishu`，必填字段：`domain`、`connectionMode`、`webhookPath`、`dmPolicy`、`groupPolicy`、`reactionNotifications`、`typingIndicator`、`resolveSenderNames`
- **openclaw-lark 插件配置读取函数**：`getLarkAccount(cfg)` 读取 `cfg.channels.feishu`，其中 `appId`/`appSecret` 支持从 secrets provider 读取
- **binding 配置**：`xiaoguanjia` 绑定了 `accountId: "main"` 和 `accountId: "feishu-assistant"`；`coding-agent` 仅绑定了 `accountId: "coding-agent"`
- **Session ID**（当前会话）：`0a344e34-137e-47ef-821e-46e548ac97b1`
- **飞书群组 ID**：`oc_8a819be3a90d35b8d0a2d5c1f4642b22`

## Goal
对张玲的当前稳定策略（stock_alpha_v3_qlib_breadth, topk=8, risk_degree=0.80）做 5 年（2021-04 ~ 2026-03）breadth_exit 效果对比回测，验证增加 breadth_exit 逻辑后年化收益和最大回撤是否有改善。脚本需成功运行并输出 JSON + Markdown 报告。

## Constraints & Preferences
- 必须使用 qlib 回测框架
- MultiIndex signal (date, instrument) 是 TopkDropoutStrategy 的必需格式
- 不能 flatten 成 DatetimeIndex，否则 `resam_ts_data` 调用 `.last()` 失败
- pandas 3.0.2 存在 merge 行为变更（KeyError: 'period'）
- benchmark 必须有效传递；`cn_data_long_2015_2026_180` 数据集缺少 SH000300 基准数据

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, or Pi agents via immediate background processes. Use when: (1) building or creating features/apps, (2) reviewing PRs in a temp clone/worktree, (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-line fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). All coding-agent runs start with background:true immediately. Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required. Completion notification must use openclaw message send, not system event/heartbeat.

resolvedSkills.name: context-memory-optimizer

Use when: agent memory is confused, sessions are too long, context window is exhausted, or multi-agent coordination is unstable. 当 agent 记忆混乱、会话过长报错、上下文窗口不够用、多 agent 协作不稳定时使用。

resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather, rain, temperature, and forecasts for locations or travel planning.

resolvedSkills.name: web-pilot
resolvedSkills.description: Search the web and read page contents without API keys. Use when you need to search via DuckDuckGo/Brave/Google (multi-page), extract readable text from URLs, browse interactively with a persistent visible browser (with tabs, click, screenshot, text search), download files/PDFs, or dismiss cookie banners. Supports JSON/markdown/text output. Powered by Playwright + Chromium.

resolvedSkills.name: xiaohongshu
resolvedSkills.description:
小红书（RedNote）内容工具。使用场景：
- 搜索小红书笔记并获取详情
- 获取首页推荐列表
- 获取帖子详情（正文、图片、互动数据、评论）
- 发表评论 / 回复评论
- 获取用户主页和笔记列表
- 点赞、收藏帖子
- 发布图文或视频笔记
- 热点话题跟踪与分析报告
- 帖子导出为长图
触发词示例：
- "搜一下小红书上的XX"
- "跟踪一下小红书上的XX热点"
- "分析小红书上关于XX的讨论"
- "小红书XX话题报告"
- "生成XX的小红书舆情报告"

resolvedSkills.name: xiaohongshu-search-summarizer
resolvedSkills.description: Searches Xiaohongshu(小红书) for a given keyword, extracts the top N posts (including texts, images, and user comments), and then synthesizes a comprehensive final analytical report. Use this skill whenever the user wants to search Xiaohongshu for a specific topic, compile research seamlessly combining text and images, or needs an aggregated thematic summary of social media posts, comments, and visual data on a given subject.

resolvedSkills.name: xiaohongshu-skills
resolvedSkills.description:
小红书自动化技能集合。支持认证登录、内容发布、搜索发现、社交互动、复合运营。
当用户要求操作小红书（发布、搜索、评论、登录、分析、点赞、收藏）时触发。

resolvedSkills.name: 1password
resolvedSkills.description: Set up and use 1Password CLI for sign-in, desktop integration, and reading or injecting secrets.

resolvedSkills.name: a-share-fusion-report
resolvedSkills.description: Generate a unified A-share report by combining three installed skills: stock-daily-report (HTML/PNG professional report), stock-watcher (fast structured quote fallback), and akshare-stock (fund-flow overlay). Use when you need one reliable daily report from current holdings, automatic fallback if one data source fails, and optional Feishu push (especially for trading-day 09:25 automation).

resolvedSkills.name: acp-router
resolvedSkills.description: Route plain-language requests for Pi, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, OpenClaw ACP, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Qwen, Kiro, Kimi, iFlow, Factory Droid, Kilocode, or explicit ACP harness work into either OpenClaw ACP runtime sessions or direct acpx-driven sessions ("telephone game" flow). For coding-agent thread requests, read this skill first, then use only `sessions_spawn` for thread creation. Codex chat binding defaults to the native Codex app-server plugin unless ACP is explicit or background spawn needs ACP.

resolvedSkills.name: agent-reach
resolvedSkills.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Install and configure upstream tools for Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu, Douyin, LinkedIn, Boss直聘, WeChat (微信公众号), RSS, and any web page — then call them directly. Use when: (1) setting up platform access tools for the first time, (2) checking which platforms are available, (3) user asks to configure/enable a platform channel. Triggers: "帮我配", "帮我添加", "帮我安装", "agent reach", "install channels", "configure twitter", "enable reddit".

resolvedSkills.name: akshare-stock
resolvedSkills.description: A股量化数据分析工具，基于AkShare库获取A股行情、财务数据、板块信息等。用于回答关于A股股票查询、行情数据、财务分析、选股等问题。

resolvedSkills.name: auto-backup-openclaw-user-data
resolvedSkills.description:
OpenClaw 用户数据自动备份技能。支持全量/选择性备份、定时执行、ZIP 压缩、日志记录、消息通知和保留策略管理。

**触发场景**：
(1) 用户要求备份 OpenClaw 数据
(2) 用户要求设置定时备份
(3) 用户询问备份配置、状态、日志
(4) 用户执行 /backup_now、/backup_status、/backup_config、/backup_list、/backup_clean 等命令
(5) HEARTBEAT 触发定时备份检查

resolvedSkills.name: auto-updater
resolvedSkills.description: Automatically update Clawdbot and all installed skills once daily. Runs via cron, checks for updates, applies them, and messages the user with a summary of what changed.

resolvedSkills.name: camoufox-cli
resolvedSkills.description: Anti-detect browser automation CLI for AI agents. Use when the user needs to interact with websites with bot detection, CAPTCHAs, or anti-bot blocks, including navigating pages, filling forms, clicking buttons, taking screenshots, extracting data, testing web apps, or automating any browser task that requires bypassing fingerprint checks.

resolvedSkills.name: capability-evolver
resolvedSkills.description: A self-evolution engine for AI agents. Analyzes runtime history to identify improvements and applies protocol-constrained evolution.

resolvedSkills.name: claude-websearch
resolvedSkills.description: Free web search using Claude Code CLI or Codex CLI's built-in WebSearch tool — no Tavily, Brave, or Exa API key required. Activate when the user says "websearch", "搜一下", "search the web", or when Tavily/Brave quota is exhausted and you need to search the web.

resolvedSkills.name: clawhub
resolvedSkills.description: Search, install, update, sync, or publish agent skills with the ClawHub CLI and registry.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, or Pi agents via immediate background processes. Use when: (1) building or creating features/apps, (2) reviewing PRs in a temp clone/worktree, (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-line fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). All coding-agent runs start with background:true immediately. Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required. Completion notification must use openclaw message send, not system event/heartbeat.

resolvedSkills.name: context-memory-optimizer
resolvedSkills.description: v3.1 (ClawHub-safe, source-verified): OpenClaw context memory optimizer. Prevents context overflow, memory drift, and token waste in long agent sessions. Based on logic verified against Claude Code source and the claw-code open-source port (compact.rs). Use when: agent memory is confused, sessions are too long, context window is exhausted, or multi-agent coordination is unstable. 当 agent 记忆混乱、会话过长报错、上下文窗口不够用、多 agent 协作不稳定时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: daily-market-watch
resolvedSkills.description: Daily market watch assistant for A-shares, Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, and Chinese public funds. Use when the user asks about 看盘, 大盘, 持仓, 预警, stock alerts, fund NAV, market summary, news sentiment, position suggestions, or wants scheduled morning/evening market reports pushed to Lark/Feishu as colorful interactive cards.

resolvedSkills.name: ddg-search
resolvedSkills.description: Web search without an API key using DuckDuckGo Lite via web_fetch. Use as a fallback when web_search fails with missing_brave_api_key error, or whenever you need to search the web and no search API is configured. Provides titles, URLs, and snippets for research queries. Zero dependencies — works with just the built-in web_fetch tool.

resolvedSkills.name: deep-research-pro
resolvedSkills.description: Multi-source deep research agent. Searches the web, synthesizes findings, and delivers cited reports. No API keys required.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-bitable
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-calendar
resolvedSkills.description: 飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: Lark/Feishu channel output rules. Always active in Lark conversations.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: firecrawl
resolvedSkills.description:
Official Firecrawl CLI skill for web scraping, search, crawling, and browser automation. Returns clean LLM-optimized markdown.

USE FOR:
- Web search and research
- Scraping pages, docs, and articles
- Site mapping and bulk content extraction
- Browser automation for interactive pages

Must be pre-installed and authenticated. See rules/install.md for setup, rules/security.md for output handling.

resolvedSkills.name: gh-issues
resolvedSkills.description: Fetch GitHub issues, delegate fixes to subagents, open PRs, watch reviews, or run /gh-issues workflows.

resolvedSkills.name: github

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck

resolvedSkills.name: markdown-mirror-search
resolvedSkills.description: Use when the user asks to search the web, read webpages, convert a URL into readable markdown/text, scrape article content, or gather information from websites without relying on raw page HTML. For search requests, use web search first to find candidate URLs, then extract readable content with this skill. Prefer mirror services in this order: (1) markdown.new for the original URL, especially when Cloudflare-backed pages work there, (2) defuddle.md for a second markdown extraction pass, (3) r.jina.ai for plain-text or markdown-style extraction. If all mirror services fail or the page requires heavier scraping, fall back to the bundled script and Scrapling.

resolvedSkills.name: pua

resolvedSkills.name: self-improvement

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent

Use when: (1) building or creating features/apps, (2) reviewing PRs in a temp clone/worktree, (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-line fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). All coding-agent runs start with background:true immediately. Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required. Completion notification must use openclaw message send, not system event/heartbeat.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, or Pi agents via immediate background processes. Use when: (1) building or creating features/apps, (2) reviewing PRs in a temp clone/worktree, (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-line fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). All coding-agent runs start with background:true immediately. Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required. Completion notification must use openclaw message send, not system event/heartbeat.

resolvedSkills.name: context-memory-optimizer

Use when: agent memory is confused, sessions are too long, context window is exhausted, or multi-agent coordination is unstable. 当 agent 记忆混乱、会话过长报错、上下文窗口不够用、多 agent 协作不稳定时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: 1password
resolvedSkills.description: Set up and use 1Password CLI for sign-in, desktop integration, and reading or injecting secrets.

resolvedSkills.name: a-share-fusion-report
resolvedSkills.description: Generate a unified A-share report by combining three installed skills: stock-daily-report (HTML/PNG professional report), stock-watcher (fast structured quote fallback), and akshare-stock (fund-flow overlay). Use when you need one reliable daily report from current holdings, automatic fallback if one data source fails, and optional Feishu push (especially for trading-day 09:25 automation).

resolvedSkills.name: acp-router
resolvedSkills.description: Route plain-language requests for Pi, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, OpenClaw ACP, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Qwen, Kiro, Kimi, iFlow, Factory Droid, Kilocode, or explicit ACP harness work into either OpenClaw ACP runtime sessions or direct acpx-driven sessions ("telephone game" flow). For coding-agent thread requests, read this skill first, then use only `sessions_spawn` for thread creation. Codex chat binding defaults to the native Codex app-server plugin unless ACP is explicit or background spawn needs ACP.

resolvedSkills.name: agent-reach
resolvedSkills.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Install and configure upstream tools for Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu, Douyin, LinkedIn, Boss直聘, WeChat (微信公众号), RSS, and any web page — then call them directly. Use when: (1) setting up platform access tools for the first time, (2) checking which platforms are available, (3) user asks to configure/enable a platform channel. Triggers: "帮我配", "帮我添加", "帮我安装", "agent reach", "install channels", "configure twitter", "enable reddit".

resolvedSkills.name: akshare-stock
resolvedSkills.description: A股量化数据分析工具，基于AkShare库获取A股行情、财务数据、板块信息等。用于回答关于A股股票查询、行情数据、财务分析、选股等问题。

resolvedSkills.name: auto-backup-openclaw-user-data
resolvedSkills.description:
OpenClaw 用户数据自动备份技能。支持全量/选择性备份、定时执行、ZIP 压缩、日志记录、消息通知和保留策略管理。

**触发场景**：
(1) 用户要求备份 OpenClaw 数据
(2) 用户要求设置定时备份
(3) 用户询问备份配置、状态、日志
(4) 用户执行 /backup_now、/backup_status、/backup_config、/backup_list、/backup_clean 等命令
(5) HEARTBEAT 触发定时备份检查

resolvedSkills.name: auto-updater
resolvedSkills.description: Automatically update Clawdbot and all installed skills once daily. Runs via cron, checks for updates, applies them, and messages the user with a summary of what changed.

resolvedSkills.name: camoufox-cli
resolvedSkills.description: Anti-detect browser automation CLI for AI agents. Use when the user needs to interact with websites with bot detection, CAPTCHAs, or anti-bot blocks, including navigating pages, filling forms, clicking buttons, taking screenshots, extracting data, testing web apps, or automating any browser task that requires bypassing fingerprint checks.

resolvedSkills.name: capability-evolver
resolvedSkills.description: A self-evolution engine for AI agents. Analyzes runtime history to identify improvements and applies protocol-constrained evolution.

resolvedSkills.name: claude-websearch
resolvedSkills.description: Free web search using Claude Code CLI or Codex CLI's built-in WebSearch tool — no Tavily, Brave, or Exa API key required. Activate when the user says "websearch", "搜一下", "search the web", or when Tavily/Brave quota is exhausted and you need to search the web.

resolvedSkills.name: clawhub
resolvedSkills.description: Search, install, update, sync, or publish agent skills with the ClawHub CLI and registry.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, or Pi agents via immediate background processes. Use when: (1) building or creating features/apps, (2) reviewing PRs in a temp clone/worktree, (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-line fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). All coding-agent runs start with background:true immediately. Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required. Completion notification must use openclaw message send, not system event/heartbeat.

resolvedSkills.name: context-memory-optimizer
resolvedSkills.description: v3.1 (ClawHub-safe, source-verified): OpenClaw context memory optimizer. Prevents context overflow, memory drift, and token waste in long agent sessions. Based on logic verified against Claude Code source and the claw-code open-source port (compact.rs). Use when: agent memory is confused, sessions are too long, context window is exhausted, or multi-agent coordination is unstable. 当 agent 记忆混乱、会话过长报错、上下文窗口不够用、多 agent 协作不稳定时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: daily-market-watch
resolvedSkills.description: Daily market watch assistant for A-shares, Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, and Chinese public funds. Use when the user asks about 看盘, 大盘, 持仓, 预警, stock alerts, fund NAV, market summary, news sentiment, position suggestions, or wants scheduled morning/evening market reports pushed to Lark/Feishu as colorful interactive cards.

resolvedSkills.name: ddg-search
resolvedSkills.description: Web search without an API key using DuckDuckGo Lite via web_fetch. Use as a fallback when web_search fails with missing_brave_api_key error, or whenever you need to search the web and no search API is configured. Provides titles, URLs, and snippets for research queries. Zero dependencies — works with just the built-in web_fetch tool.

resolvedSkills.name: deep-research-pro
resolvedSkills.description: Multi-source deep research agent. Searches the web, synthesizes findings, and delivers cited reports. No API keys required.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-bitable
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-calendar
resolvedSkills.description: 飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: Lark/Feishu channel output rules. Always active in Lark conversations.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: firecrawl
resolvedSkills.description:
Official Firecrawl CLI skill for web scraping, search, crawling, and browser automation. Returns clean LLM-optimized markdown.

USE FOR:
- Web search and research

- Site mapping and bulk content extraction
- Browser automation for interactive pages

Must be pre-installed and authenticated. See rules/install.md for setup, rules/security.md for output handling.

resolvedSkills.name: markdown-mirror-search
resolvedSkills.description: Use when the user asks to search the web, read webpages, convert a URL into readable markdown/text, scrape article content, or gather information from websites without relying on raw page HTML. For search requests, use web search first to find candidate URLs, then extract readable content with this skill. Prefer mirror services in this order: (1) markdown.new for the original URL, especially when Cloudflare-backed pages work there, (2) defuddle.md for a second markdown extraction pass, (3) r.jina.ai for plain-text or markdown-style extraction. If all mirror services fail or the page requires heavier scraping, fall back to the bundled script and Scrapling.

resolvedSkills.name: openclaw-spirits
resolvedSkills.description: Companion spirit system for OpenClaw agents. Deterministically generates a unique spirit (24 species, 5 rarities) based on user identity. Use when user says spirit, 灵兽, summon, my companion, my pet, or when the skill is first installed.

resolvedSkills.name: openclaw-workspace
resolvedSkills.description: Use when maintaining or optimizing OpenClaw workspace files — AGENTS.md, TOOLS.md, SOUL.md, USER.md, IDENTITY.md, HEARTBEAT.md, BOOT.md, MEMORY.md, and related checklists and memory files. Covers workspace auditing, token budget analysis, new agent workspace setup from scratch, memory distillation, and cross-file consistency reviews.

resolvedSkills.name: pua
resolvedSkills.description: Forces high-agency exhaustive problem-solving with corporate PUA pressure. Triggers on user frustration, repeated failures, passive behavior, or quality complaints. Common triggers: try harder, figure it out, stop giving up, you keep failing, stop spinning, you broke it, 加油, 别偷懒, 你再试试, 又错了, 降智了, 你又在原地打转, 你把之前的改坏了, /pua. All task types.

resolvedSkills.name: self-improvement
resolvedSkills.description: Captures learnings, errors, and corrections to enable continuous improvement. Use when: (1) A command or operation fails unexpectedly, (2) User corrects Claude ('No, that's wrong...', 'Actually...'), (3) User requests a capability that doesn't exist, (4) An external API or tool fails, (5) Claude realizes its knowledge is outdated or incorrect, (6) A better approach is discovered for a recurring task. Also review learnings before major tasks.

resolvedSkills.name: shadowrocket-node-sync
resolvedSkills.description: Monitor the GitHub repo seablue1985/v2ray-SSR-Clash-Verge-Shadowrocke, extract free proxy node URIs, generate local Shadowrocket-friendly subscription files, and optionally send Feishu notifications when the node inventory changes. Use when the user asks to watch free nodes, refresh GitHub proxy nodes, sync/update Shadowrocket free nodes, build a local subscription source, get alerted on node changes, or automate periodic node checks.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator

resolvedSkills.name: skill-evolver
resolvedSkills.description: Skill 自进化引擎。判断流程是否值得沉淀、创建/更新 Skill、去重审计、每日定时回顾。触发场景：复杂任务（≥5步工具调用）完成后自觉判断沉淀时机，以及每日 cron 回顾。

resolvedSkills.name: skill-vetter

resolvedSkills.name: stock-market-pro

resolvedSkills.description: Inspect Tonghuashun/同花顺真实持仓 from two sources: (1) the 10jqka 投资账本 web app (`tzzb.10jqka.com.cn`) when a reusable browser session or exported request is available, and (2) local macOS Tonghuashun app ledger files as a fail-closed fallback. resolvedSkills.name: union-search-skill
resolvedSkills.description: 当用户需要跨多个平台搜索内容时使用此技能，包括 GitHub（仓库、代码、问题）、Reddit（帖子、子版块、用户）、小红书、抖音、Bilibili、YouTube、Twitter、Google、Tavily、秘塔搜索、火山引擎，以及通用搜索引擎（DuckDuckGo、Brave、Yahoo、Bing、Wikipedia、Anna's Archive），或从 18 个图片平台（百度、Bing、Google、Pixabay、Unsplash、火山引擎等）下载图片。提供统一的搜索接口，支持结构化输出格式、结果过滤、排序、自动响应归档和批量图片下载（保留元数据）。

resolvedSkills.name: weather

resolvedSkills.name: web-pilot

Supports JSON/markdown/text output. Powered by Playwright + Chromium.

resolvedSkills.name: xiaohongshu
resolvedSkills.description:
小红书（RedNote）内容工具。使用场景：
- 搜索小红书笔记并获取详情
- 获取首页推荐列表
- 获取帖子详情（正文、图片、互动数据、评论）

- 获取用户主页和笔记列表

- 热点话题跟踪与分析报告
- 帖子导出为长图
触发词示例：

- "跟踪一下小红书上的XX热点"
- "分析小红书上关于XX的讨论"
- "小红书XX话题报告"
- "生成XX的小红书舆情报告"

resolvedSkills.name: xiaohongshu-search-summarizer
resolvedSkills.description: Searches Xiaohongshu(小红书) for a given keyword, extracts the top N posts (including texts, images, and user comments), and then synthesizes a comprehensive final analytical report. Use this skill whenever the user wants to search Xiaohongshu for a specific topic, compile research seamlessly combining text and images, or needs an aggregated thematic summary of social media posts, comments, and visual data on a given subject.

## Decisions
- **Fix `integrate_dual_factor_overlay.py` to normalize `date_tag` to compact YYYYMMDD format before constructing filenames**: The root cause of paper profiles pipeline stall (since 2026-04-24) is a date format mismatch. `live_system_v1_20260428.json` has `"date": "20260428"` (compact), but `live_system_v1_20260429.json` has `"date": "2026-04-29"` and `live_system_v1_20260430.json` has `"date": "2026-04-30"` (ISO format). The integration script passes the raw date value from the payload into filenames, producing `dual_factor_shadow_2026-04-30_conservative_2026-04-30_summary.json`, but consumers like `runtime_date_utils.py` expect `dual_factor_shadow*_conservative_20260430_summary.json` (compact). Normalizing the date tag in `integrate_dual_factor_overlay.py` resolves both the file name mismatch for future runs and prevents recurrence.
- **For today's already-generated files (with ISO dates)**: Decision deferred; could rename existing files, create symlinks, or make consumer accept both formats.

## Decisions
- **Fix approach**: Integrate `enrich_holdings_with_prices.py` into the alpha55 pipeline OR add lightweight price fetching directly in `build_account_payload()` in `run_alpha55_paper_sim.py`, replacing cost-based NAV with market-value-based NAV
- **Root cause**: `build_account_payload()` computes `nav = remaining_cash + total_cost` where `total_cost` = sum of original purchase costs (cost basis accounting). For alpha55, `cost_price` is always set to `ref_price` (signal reference price, historical), never updated with real-time prices → NAV never changes
- **Key insight**: Other profiles (defensive/balanced/aggressive) get real-time prices from `enrich_holdings_with_prices.py` (called via `run_daily_overlays.sh`). Their `paper_*_portfolio_positions_latest.csv` has `last_price`, `market_value`, `unrealized_pnl` columns populated from Tencent qt.gtimg.cn live feed. Alpha55 is standalone pipeline that never calls `enrich_holdings_with_prices.py`
- **Comparison**: Defensive shows `cost_price=17.8458`, `last_price=19.82`, `market_value=9910`, `unrealized_pnl=987.09`. Alpha55 shows `cost_price=last_price` (both = ref_price), `market_value=0` (not tracked), `unrealized_pnl=0`

resolvedSkills.name: 1password
resolvedSkills.description: Set up and use 1Password CLI for sign-in, desktop integration, and reading or injecting secrets.

resolvedSkills.name: a-share-fusion-report
resolvedSkills.description: Generate a unified A-share report by combining three installed skills: stock-daily-report (HTML/PNG professional report), stock-watcher (fast structured quote fallback), and akshare-stock (fund-flow overlay). Use when you need one reliable daily report from current holdings, automatic fallback if one data source fails, and optional Feishu push (especially for trading-day 09:25 automation).

resolvedSkills.name: acp-router
resolvedSkills.description: Route plain-language requests for Pi, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, OpenClaw ACP, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Qwen, Kiro, Kimi, iFlow, Factory Droid, Kilocode, or explicit ACP harness work into either OpenClaw ACP runtime sessions or direct acpx-driven sessions ("telephone game" flow). For coding-agent thread requests, read this skill first, then use only `sessions_spawn` for thread creation. Codex chat binding defaults to the native Codex app-server plugin unless ACP is explicit or background spawn needs ACP.

resolvedSkills.name: agent-reach
resolvedSkills.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Install and configure upstream tools for Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu, Douyin, LinkedIn, Boss直聘, WeChat (微信公众号), RSS, and any web page — then call them directly. Use when: (1) setting up platform access tools for the first time, (2) checking which platforms are available, (3) user asks to configure/enable a platform channel. Triggers: "帮我配", "帮我添加", "帮我安装", "agent reach", "install channels", "configure twitter", "enable reddit".

resolvedSkills.name: akshare-stock
resolvedSkills.description: A股量化数据分析工具，基于AkShare库获取A股行情、财务数据、板块信息等。用于回答关于A股股票查询、行情数据、财务分析、选股等问题。

resolvedSkills.name: auto-backup-openclaw-user-data
resolvedSkills.description:
OpenClaw 用户数据自动备份技能。支持全量/选择性备份、定时执行、ZIP 压缩、日志记录、消息通知和保留策略管理。

**触发场景**：
(1) 用户要求备份 OpenClaw 数据
(2) 用户要求设置定时备份
(3) 用户询问备份配置、状态、日志
(4) 用户执行 /backup_now、/backup_status、/backup_config、/backup_list、/backup_clean 等命令
(5) HEARTBEAT 触发定时备份检查

resolvedSkills.name: auto-updater

resolvedSkills.name: camoufox-cli

resolvedSkills.name: capability-evolver
resolvedSkills.description: A self-evolution engine for AI agents. Analyzes runtime history to identify improvements and applies protocol-constrained evolution.

resolvedSkills.name: claude-websearch
resolvedSkills.description: Free web search using Claude Code CLI or Codex CLI's built-in WebSearch tool — no Tavily, Brave, or Exa API key required. Activate when the user says "websearch", "搜一下", "search the web", or when Tavily/Brave quota is exhausted and you need to search the web.

resolvedSkills.name: clawhub
resolvedSkills.description: Search, install, update, sync, or publish agent skills with the ClawHub CLI and registry.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, or Pi agents via immediate background processes. Use when: (1) building or creating features/apps, (2) reviewing PRs in a temp clone/worktree, (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-line fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). All coding-agent runs start with background:true immediately. Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required. Completion notification must use openclaw message send, not system event/heartbeat.

resolvedSkills.name: context-memory-optimizer
resolvedSkills.description: v3.1 (ClawHub-safe, source-verified): OpenClaw context memory optimizer. Prevents context overflow, memory drift, and token waste in long agent sessions. Based on logic verified against Claude Code source and the claw-code open-source port (compact.rs). Use when: agent memory is confused, sessions are too long, context window is exhausted, or multi-agent coordination is unstable. 当 agent 记忆混乱、会话过长报错、上下文窗口不够用、多 agent 协作不稳定时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: daily-market-watch
resolvedSkills.description: Daily market watch assistant for A-shares, Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, and Chinese public funds. Use when the user asks about 看盘, 大盘, 持仓, 预警, stock alerts, fund NAV, market summary, news sentiment, position suggestions, or wants scheduled morning/evening market reports pushed to Lark/Feishu as colorful interactive cards.

resolvedSkills.name: ddg-search
resolvedSkills.description: Web search without an API key using DuckDuckGo Lite via web_fetch. Use as a fallback when web_search fails with missing_brave_api_key error, or whenever you need to search the web and no search API is configured. Provides titles, URLs, and snippets for research queries. Zero dependencies — works with just the built-in web_fetch tool.

resolvedSkills.name: deep-research-pro
resolvedSkills.description: Multi-source deep research agent. Searches the web, synthesizes findings, and delivers cited reports. No API keys required.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-bitable
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-calendar
resolvedSkills.description: 飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: Lark/Feishu channel output rules. Always active in Lark conversations.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: firecrawl
resolvedSkills.description:
Official Firecrawl CLI skill for web scraping, search, crawling, and browser automation. Returns clean LLM-optimized markdown.

USE FOR:
- Web search and research
- Scraping pages, docs, and articles
- Site mapping and bulk content extraction
- Browser automation for interactive pages

Must be pre-installed and authenticated. See rules/install.md for setup, rules/security.md for output handling.

resolvedSkills.name: markdown-mirror-search
resolvedSkills.description: Use when the user asks to search the web, read webpages, convert a URL into readable markdown/text, scrape article content, or gather information from websites without relying on raw page HTML. For search requests, use web search first to find candidate URLs, then extract readable content with this skill. Prefer mirror services in this order: (1) markdown.new for the original URL, especially when Cloudflare-backed pages work there, (2) defuddle.md for a second markdown extraction pass, (3) r.jina.ai for plain-text or markdown-style extraction. If all mirror services fail or the page requires heavier scraping, fall back to the bundled script and Scrapling.

resolvedSkills.name: pua

Common triggers: try harder, figure it out, stop giving up, you keep failing, stop spinning, you broke it, 加油, 别偷懒, 你再试试, 又错了, 降智了, 你又在原地打转, 你把之前的改坏了, /pua. All task types.

resolvedSkills.name: self-improvement
resolvedSkills.description: Captures learnings, errors, and corrections to enable continuous improvement. Also review learnings before major tasks.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent

Use when: (1) building or creating features/apps, (2) reviewing PRs in a temp clone/worktree, (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-line fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). All coding-agent runs start with background:true immediately. Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required. Completion notification must use openclaw message send, not system event/heartbeat.

resolvedSkills.name: 1password

resolvedSkills.name: a-share-fusion-report
resolvedSkills.description: Generate a unified A-share report by combining three installed skills: stock-daily-report (HTML/PNG professional report), stock-watcher (fast structured quote fallback), and akshare-stock (fund-flow overlay). Use when you need one reliable daily report from current holdings, automatic fallback if one data source fails, and optional Feishu push (especially for trading-day 09:25 automation).

resolvedSkills.name: acp-router
resolvedSkills.description: Route plain-language requests for Pi, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, OpenClaw ACP, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Qwen, Kiro, Kimi, iFlow, Factory Droid, Kilocode, or explicit ACP harness work into either OpenClaw ACP runtime sessions or direct acpx-driven sessions ("telephone game" flow). For coding-agent thread requests, read this skill first, then use only `sessions_spawn` for thread creation. Codex chat binding defaults to the native Codex app-server plugin unless ACP is explicit or background spawn needs ACP.

resolvedSkills.name: agent-reach
resolvedSkills.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Install and configure upstream tools for Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu, Douyin, LinkedIn, Boss直聘, WeChat (微信公众号), RSS, and any web page — then call them directly. Use when: (1) setting up platform access tools for the first time, (2) checking which platforms are available, (3) user asks to configure/enable a platform channel. Triggers: "帮我配", "帮我添加", "帮我安装", "agent reach", "install channels", "configure twitter", "enable reddit".

resolvedSkills.name: akshare-stock

resolvedSkills.name: auto-backup-openclaw-user-data

OpenClaw 用户数据自动备份技能。支持全量/选择性备份、定时执行、ZIP 压缩、日志记录、消息通知和保留策略管理。

(1) 用户要求备份 OpenClaw 数据

resolvedSkills.name: auto-updater

resolvedSkills.name: camoufox-cli

resolvedSkills.name: capability-evolver

resolvedSkills.name: claude-websearch
resolvedSkills.description: Free web search using Claude Code CLI or Codex CLI's built-in WebSearch tool — no Tavily, Brave, or Exa API key required. Activate when the user says "websearch", "搜一下", "search the web", or when Tavily/Brave quota is exhausted and you need to search the web.

resolvedSkills.name: clawhub
resolvedSkills.description: Search, install, update, sync, or publish agent skills with the ClawHub CLI and registry.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, or Pi agents via immediate background processes. Use when: (1) building or creating features/apps, (2) reviewing PRs in a temp clone/worktree, (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-line fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). All coding-agent runs start with background:true immediately. Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required. Completion notification must use openclaw message send, not system event/heartbeat.

resolvedSkills.name: context-memory-optimizer
resolvedSkills.description: v3.1 (ClawHub-safe, source-verified): OpenClaw context memory optimizer. Prevents context overflow, memory drift, and token waste in long agent sessions. Based on logic verified against Claude Code source and the claw-code open-source port (compact.rs). Use when: agent memory is confused, sessions are too long, context window is exhausted, or multi-agent coordination is unstable. 当 agent 记忆混乱、会话过长报错、上下文窗口不够用、多 agent 协作不稳定时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: daily-market-watch

resolvedSkills.name: markdown-mirror-search

Prefer mirror services in this order: (1) markdown.new for the original URL, especially when Cloudflare-backed pages work there, (2) defuddle.md for a second markdown extraction pass, (3) r.jina.ai for plain-text or markdown-style extraction. If all mirror services fail or the page requires heavier scraping, fall back to the bundled script and Scrapling.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-vetter

resolvedSkills.name: slack

resolvedSkills.name: taskflow

resolvedSkills.name: taskflow-inbox-triage

resolvedSkills.name: things-mac

resolvedSkills.name: ths-local-holdings
resolvedSkills.description: Inspect Tonghuashun/同花顺真实持仓 from two sources: (1) the 10jqka 投资账本 web app (`tzzb.10jqka.com.cn`) when a reusable browser session or exported request is available, and (2) local macOS Tonghuashun app ledger files as a fail-closed fallback. Use when the user mentions 同花顺持仓、投资账本网页、10jqka tzzb 链接、同花顺 App、本地账本、多账户混仓、账本识别、真实持仓校准, or when reports/alerts are using the wrong holdings scope and you need a verified source instead of guessing.

resolvedSkills.name: union-search-skill

resolvedSkills.name: weather

resolvedSkills.name: web-pilot
resolvedSkills.description: Search the web and read page contents without API keys. Use when you need to search via DuckDuckGo/Brave/Google (multi-page), extract readable text from URLs, browse interactively with a persistent visible browser (with tabs, click, screenshot, text search), download files/PDFs, or dismiss cookie banners. Supports JSON/markdown/text output. Powered by Playwright + Chromium.

resolvedSkills.name: xiaohongshu
resolvedSkills.description:
小红书（RedNote）内容工具。使用场景：
- 搜索小红书笔记并获取详情
- 获取首页推荐列表
- 获取帖子详情（正文、图片、互动数据、评论）
- 发表评论 / 回复评论
- 获取用户主页和笔记列表
- 点赞、收藏帖子
- 发布图文或视频笔记
- 热点话题跟踪与分析报告
- 帖子导出为长图
触发词示例：
- "搜一下小红书上的XX"
- "跟踪一下小红书上的XX热点"
- "分析小红书上关于XX的讨论"
- "小红书XX话题报告"
- "生成XX的小红书舆情报告"

resolvedSkills.name: xiaohongshu-search-summarizer
resolvedSkills.description: Searches Xiaohongshu(小红书) for a given keyword, extracts the top N posts (including texts, images, and user comments), and then synthesizes a comprehensive final analytical report. Use this skill whenever the user wants to search Xiaohongshu for a specific topic, compile research seamlessly combining text and images, or needs an aggregated thematic summary of social media posts, comments, and visual data on a given subject.

resolvedSkills.name: xiaohongshu-skills
resolvedSkills.description:
小红书自动化技能集合。支持认证登录、内容发布、搜索发现、社交互动、复合运营。
当用户要求操作小红书（发布、搜索、评论、登录、分析、点赞、收藏）时触发。

resolvedSkills.name: 1password
resolvedSkills.description: Set up and use 1Password CLI for sign-in, desktop integration, and reading or injecting secrets.

resolvedSkills.name: a-share-fusion-report
resolvedSkills.description: Generate a unified A-share report by combining three installed skills: stock-daily-report (HTML/PNG professional report), stock-watcher (fast structured quote fallback), and akshare-stock (fund-flow overlay). Use when you need one reliable daily report from current holdings, automatic fallback if one data source fails, and optional Feishu push (especially for trading-day 09:25 automation).

resolvedSkills.name: acp-router
resolvedSkills.description: Route plain-language requests for Pi, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, OpenClaw ACP, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Qwen, Kiro, Kimi, iFlow, Factory Droid, Kilocode, or explicit ACP harness work into either OpenClaw ACP runtime sessions or direct acpx-driven sessions ("telephone game" flow). For coding-agent thread requests, read this skill first, then use only `sessions_spawn` for thread creation. Codex chat binding defaults to the native Codex app-server plugin unless ACP is explicit or background spawn needs ACP.

resolvedSkills.name: agent-reach
resolvedSkills.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Install and configure upstream tools for Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu, Douyin, LinkedIn, Boss直聘, WeChat (微信公众号), RSS, and any web page — then call them directly. Use when: (1) setting up platform access tools for the first time, (2) checking which platforms are available, (3) user asks to configure/enable a platform channel. Triggers: "帮我配", "帮我添加", "帮我安装", "agent reach", "install channels", "configure twitter", "enable reddit".

resolvedSkills.name: akshare-stock
resolvedSkills.description: A股量化数据分析工具，基于AkShare库获取A股行情、财务数据、板块信息等。用于回答关于A股股票查询、行情数据、财务分析、选股等问题。

resolvedSkills.name: auto-backup-openclaw-user-data
resolvedSkills.description:
OpenClaw 用户数据自动备份技能。支持全量/选择性备份、定时执行、ZIP 压缩、日志记录、消息通知和保留策略管理。

**触发场景**：
(1) 用户要求备份 OpenClaw 数据
(2) 用户要求设置定时备份
(3) 用户询问备份配置、状态、日志
(4) 用户执行 /backup_now、/backup_status、/backup_config、/backup_list、/backup_clean 等命令
(5) HEARTBEAT 触发定时备份检查

resolvedSkills.name: auto-updater
resolvedSkills.description: Automatically update Clawdbot and all installed skills once daily. Runs via cron, checks for updates, applies them, and messages the user with a summary of what changed.

resolvedSkills.name: camoufox-cli
resolvedSkills.description: Anti-detect browser automation CLI for AI agents. Use when the user needs to interact with websites with bot detection, CAPTCHAs, or anti-bot blocks, including navigating pages, filling forms, clicking buttons, taking screenshots, extracting data, testing web apps, or automating any browser task that requires bypassing fingerprint checks.

resolvedSkills.name: capability-evolver
resolvedSkills.description: A self-evolution engine for AI agents. Analyzes runtime history to identify improvements and applies protocol-constrained evolution.

resolvedSkills.name: claude-websearch
resolvedSkills.description: Free web search using Claude Code CLI or Codex CLI's built-in WebSearch tool — no Tavily, Brave, or Exa API key required. Activate when the user says "websearch", "搜一下", "search the web", or when Tavily/Brave quota is exhausted and you need to search the web.

resolvedSkills.name: clawhub
resolvedSkills.description: Search, install, update, sync, or publish agent skills with the ClawHub CLI and registry.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, or Pi agents via immediate background processes. Use when: (1) building or creating features/apps, (2) reviewing PRs in a temp clone/worktree, (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-line fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). All coding-agent runs start with background:true immediately. Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required. Completion notification must use openclaw message send, not system event/heartbeat.

resolvedSkills.name: context-memory-optimizer
resolvedSkills.description: v3.1 (ClawHub-safe, source-verified): OpenClaw context memory optimizer. Prevents context overflow, memory drift, and token waste in long agent sessions. Based on logic verified against Claude Code source and the claw-code open-source port (compact.rs). Use when: agent memory is confused, sessions are too long, context window is exhausted, or multi-agent coordination is unstable. 当 agent 记忆混乱、会话过长报错、上下文窗口不够用、多 agent 协作不稳定时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: daily-market-watch
resolvedSkills.description: Daily market watch assistant for A-shares, Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, and Chinese public funds. Use when the user asks about 看盘, 大盘, 持仓, 预警, stock alerts, fund NAV, market summary, news sentiment, position suggestions, or wants scheduled morning/evening market reports pushed to Lark/Feishu as colorful interactive cards.

resolvedSkills.name: ddg-search
resolvedSkills.description: Web search without an API key using DuckDuckGo Lite via web_fetch. Use as a fallback when web_search fails with missing_brave_api_key error, or whenever you need to search the web and no search API is configured. Provides titles, URLs, and snippets for research queries. Zero dependencies — works with just the built-in web_fetch tool.

resolvedSkills.name: deep-research-pro
resolvedSkills.description: Multi-source deep research agent. Searches the web, synthesizes findings, and delivers cited reports. No API keys required.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-bitable

飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: firecrawl
resolvedSkills.description:
Official Firecrawl CLI skill for web scraping, search, crawling, and browser automation. Returns clean LLM-optimized markdown.

USE FOR:
- Web search and research
- Scraping pages, docs, and articles
- Site mapping and bulk content extraction
- Browser automation for interactive pages

Must be pre-installed and authenticated. See rules/install.md for setup, rules/security.md for output handling.

resolvedSkills.name: gh-issues
resolvedSkills.description: Fetch GitHub issues, delegate fixes to subagents, open PRs, watch reviews, or run /gh-issues workflows.

resolvedSkills.name: github
resolvedSkills.description: Use gh for GitHub issues, PR status, CI/logs, comments, reviews, releases, and API queries.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Audit and harden hosts running OpenClaw for SSH, firewall, updates, exposure, cron checks, and risk posture.

resolvedSkills.name: markdown-mirror-search
resolvedSkills.description: Use when the user asks to search the web, read webpages, convert a URL into readable markdown/text, scrape article content, or gather information from websites without relying on raw page HTML. For search requests, use web search first to find candidate URLs, then extract readable content with this skill. Prefer mirror services in this order: (1) markdown.new for the original URL, especially when Cloudflare-backed pages work there, (2) defuddle.md for a second markdown extraction pass, (3) r.jina.ai for plain-text or markdown-style extraction. If all mirror services fail or the page requires heavier scraping, fall back to the bundled script and Scrapling.

resolvedSkills.name: mcporter
resolvedSkills.description: List, configure, authenticate, call, and inspect MCP servers/tools with mcporter over HTTP or stdio.

resolvedSkills.name: MiniMax Image Generation
resolvedSkills.description: MiniMax AI图片生成，支持 image-01 和 image-01-live 模型。 image-01: 画面表现细腻，支持文生图、图生图 image-01-live: 手绘、卡通等画风增强，支持文生图并进行画风设置 需要 MiniMax API Key (Coding Plan)。

resolvedSkills.name: model-usage
resolvedSkills.description: Summarize CodexBar local cost logs by model for Codex or Claude, including current or full breakdowns.

resolvedSkills.name: multi-search-engine
resolvedSkills.description: Multi search engine integration with 17 engines (8 CN + 9 Global). Supports advanced search operators, time filters, site search, privacy engines, and WolframAlpha knowledge queries. No API keys required.

resolvedSkills.name: news-market
resolvedSkills.description: 全球股市早间要闻生成技能。用于每天早上生成包含全球股市相关新闻、大盘体温、板块映射、看涨/看跌判断的早间报告。触发场景：(1) 每天08:50定时执行 (2) 用户手动触发"生成早间要闻"或"今日股市消息"

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw Android, iOS, or macOS node pairing, QR/setup code, route, auth, and connection failures.

resolvedSkills.name: openclaw-backup
resolvedSkills.description: Backup and restore OpenClaw data. Use when user asks to create backups, set up automatic backup schedules, restore from backup, or manage backup rotation. Handles ~/.openclaw directory archiving with proper exclusions.

resolvedSkills.name: openclaw-spirits
resolvedSkills.description: Companion spirit system for OpenClaw agents. Deterministically generates a unique spirit (24 species, 5 rarities) based on user identity. Use when user says spirit, 灵兽, summon, my companion, my pet, or when the skill is first installed.

resolvedSkills.name: openclaw-workspace
resolvedSkills.description: Use when maintaining or optimizing OpenClaw workspace files — AGENTS.md, TOOLS.md, SOUL.md, USER.md, IDENTITY.md, HEARTBEAT.md, BOOT.md, MEMORY.md, and related checklists and memory files. Covers workspace auditing, token budget analysis, new agent workspace setup from scratch, memory distillation, and cross-file consistency reviews.

resolvedSkills.name: pua
resolvedSkills.description: Forces high-agency exhaustive problem-solving with corporate PUA pressure. Triggers on user frustration, repeated failures, passive behavior, or quality complaints. Common triggers: try harder, figure it out, stop giving up, you keep failing, stop spinning, you broke it, 加油, 别偷懒, 你再试试, 又错了, 降智了, 你又在原地打转, 你把之前的改坏了, /pua. All task types.

resolvedSkills.name: self-improvement
resolvedSkills.description: Captures learnings, errors, and corrections to enable continuous improvement. Use when: (1) A command or operation fails unexpectedly, (2) User corrects Claude ('No, that's wrong...', 'Actually...'), (3) User requests a capability that doesn't exist, (4) An external API or tool fails, (5) Claude realizes its knowledge is outdated or incorrect, (6) A better approach is discovered for a recurring task. Also review learnings before major tasks.

resolvedSkills.name: shadowrocket-node-sync
resolvedSkills.description: Monitor the GitHub repo seablue1985/v2ray-SSR-Clash-Verge-Shadowrocke, extract free proxy node URIs, generate local Shadowrocket-friendly subscription files, and optionally send Feishu notifications when the node inventory changes. Use when the user asks to watch free nodes, refresh GitHub proxy nodes, sync/update Shadowrocket free nodes, build a local subscription source, get alerted on node changes, or automate periodic node checks.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, tidy, review, audit, or restructure AgentSkills and SKILL.md files.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-evolver
resolvedSkills.description: Skill 自进化引擎。判断流程是否值得沉淀、创建/更新 Skill、去重审计、每日定时回顾。触发场景：复杂任务（≥5步工具调用）完成后自觉判断沉淀时机，以及每日 cron 回顾。

resolvedSkills.name: skill-vetter
resolvedSkills.description: Security-first skill vetting for AI agents. Use before installing any skill from ClawdHub, GitHub, or other sources. Checks for red flags, permission scope, and suspicious patterns.

resolvedSkills.name: slack

Use when the user wants to track specific stocks, get performance summaries, or manage their watchlist.

resolvedSkills.name: things-mac

resolvedSkills.name: ths-local-holdings
resolvedSkills.description: Inspect Tonghuashun/同花顺真实持仓 from two sources: (1) the 10jqka 投资账本 web app (`tzzb.10jqka.com.cn`) when a reusable browser session or exported request is available, and (2) local macOS Tonghuashun app ledger files as a fail-closed fallback. Use when the user mentions 同花顺持仓、投资账本网页、10jqka tzzb 链接、同花顺 App、本地账本、多账户混仓、账本识别、真实持仓校准, or when reports/alerts are using the wrong holdings scope and you need a verified source instead of guessing.

resolvedSkills.name: union-search-skill
resolvedSkills.description: 当用户需要跨多个平台搜索内容时使用此技能，包括 GitHub（仓库、代码、问题）、Reddit（帖子、子版块、用户）、小红书、抖音、Bilibili、YouTube、Twitter、Google、Tavily、秘塔搜索、火山引擎，以及通用搜索引擎（DuckDuckGo、Brave、Yahoo、Bing、Wikipedia、Anna's Archive），或从 18 个图片平台（百度、Bing、Google、Pixabay、Unsplash、火山引擎等）下载图片。提供统一的搜索接口，支持结构化输出格式、结果过滤、排序、自动响应归档和批量图片下载（保留元数据）。

resolvedSkills.name: weather

resolvedSkills.name: web-pilot

resolvedSkills.name: xiaohongshu
resolvedSkills.description:
小红书（RedNote）内容工具。使用场景：
- 搜索小红书笔记并获取详情
- 获取首页推荐列表
- 获取帖子详情（正文、图片、互动数据、评论）
- 发表评论 / 回复评论
- 获取用户主页和笔记列表
- 点赞、收藏帖子
- 发布图文或视频笔记
- 热点话题跟踪与分析报告
- 帖子导出为长图
触发词示例：
- "搜一下小红书上的XX"
- "跟踪一下小红书上的XX热点"
- "分析小红书上关于XX的讨论"
- "小红书XX话题报告"
- "生成XX的小红书舆情报告"

resolvedSkills.name: xiaohongshu-search-summarizer
resolvedSkills.description: Searches Xiaohongshu(小红书) for a given keyword, extracts the top N posts (including texts, images, and user comments), and then synthesizes a comprehensive final analytical report. Use this skill whenever the user wants to search Xiaohongshu for a specific topic, compile research seamlessly combining text and images, or needs an aggregated thematic summary of social media posts, comments, and visual data on a given subject.

resolvedSkills.name: xiaohongshu-skills
